basics.name: environment
basics.label: Environment
basics.toolTip: Select the deployment environment. This affects resource naming and default configuration (e.g., license tier).

options.text: RapidStart AI connects to your Dataverse environment to read and write CRM data. You can find your environment URL in the Power Platform Admin Center under Environments > your environment > Environment URL.

elements.name: dataverseUrl
elements.label: Dataverse Environment URL
elements.toolTip: The URL of your Dataverse environment. Find it in the Power Platform Admin Center under Environments > [your environment] > Environment URL.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid Dataverse URL starting with https:// and ending with .dynamics.com

options.text: The Function App uses a system-assigned managed identity by default. An Azure AD App Registration is only needed if you require a specific client credential flow. You can configure this after deployment.

elements.name: tenantId
elements.label: Azure AD Tenant ID
elements.toolTip: Your Azure AD tenant ID. Pre-filled with the current tenant.

elements.name: aadClientId
elements.label: Azure AD Client ID (Optional)
elements.toolTip: Optional. Provide the Client ID of an existing Azure AD App Registration. Leave blank to use the system-assigned managed identity (recommended).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid GUID or left blank.
